name: Sysmon Channel Reference Deletion
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)
SIGMA Title: Sysmon Channel Reference Deletion
SIGMA Description: Potential threat actor tampering with Sysmon manifest and eventually disabling it

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (("Event ID"=4657 AND (LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%winevt\publishers\{5770385f-c22a-43e0-bf4c-06f5698ffbd9}%' OR LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%winevt\channels\microsoft-windows-sysmon/operational%') AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%enabled%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%newvalue%0%') OR ("Event ID"=4663 AND (LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%winevt\publishers\{5770385f-c22a-43e0-bf4c-06f5698ffbd9}%' OR LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%winevt\channels\microsoft-windows-sysmon/operational%') AND "Access Mask"=65536)) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Sysmon Channel Reference Deletion on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (("Event ID"=4657 AND (LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%winevt\publishers\{5770385f-c22a-43e0-bf4c-06f5698ffbd9}%' OR LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%winevt\channels\microsoft-windows-sysmon/operational%') AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%enabled%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%newvalue%0%') OR ("Event ID"=4663 AND (LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%winevt\publishers\{5770385f-c22a-43e0-bf4c-06f5698ffbd9}%' OR LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%winevt\channels\microsoft-windows-sysmon/operational%') AND "Access Mask"=65536)) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Sysmon Channel Reference Deletion
